name: yolo-closure
mission: Close the remaining Phase 3.5 gap. Extend the runtime gate or verification path so YOLO mode has stricter evidence for enable, burst, expiry, and recovery, and update the roadmap document to reflect the new acceptance coverage accurately.
extraInstructions: Keep the gate script executable from the current repo without asking the user to do manual setup.
Favor pragmatic verification that can be rerun locally over plan-only wording.
Update the roadmap only for what your code actually makes true.

text: [ ] Read AGENTS, roadmap, and relevant OpenClaw files to understand current runtime/YOLO gate behavior
[ ] Implement stricter YOLO runtime gate evidence in owned script
[ ] Update roadmap acceptance coverage to match implemented verification
[ ] Run targeted checks and summarize remaining risks
